pred: MATCH (p:Person {name: 'Jerry Perenchio'})-[:FOUNDED_BY]->(c:Company)-[:OPERATES_IN]->(i:Industry) WITH c, COUNT(DISTINCT i) AS industry_count RETURN c.name AS company_name, industry_count ORDER BY c.name

question: Provide the names of all individuals who have served as board members for Goldman Sachs, along with the number of companies where each has held a board member position.

question: How many companies are subsidiaries of either Redcats or Ginori 1735?
